category_sources: source_facts.description names Climate Data Operators; official CDO overview says CDO manipulates and analyzes climate and NWP model data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description is Climate Data Operators; official CDO overview uses the same full name.
docs_sources: Official CDO project wiki provides documentation and links the embedded user guide PDF.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official public source-control repository URL was confirmed from official CDO project sources.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CDO; official CDO overview says it supports GRIB and netCDF climate/NWP data processing.
